calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lesley Schneider.
Sydney Fairbairy, Esq., for Plaintiff: Upside Magazine, represented by Rebecca Hawk, the authorized agent.
No appearance by the Defendant.
10;00 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness Rebecca Hawk was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Copy of AD run for June 2000----------------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Invoice for $28,191.10 dtd. 4-26-2000 ------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #3 - Second AD run for the Defendant.--------------------ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #4 - Second invoice for $14,095.55 dtd. July 2000--------ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #5 - Check in the amount of $3,523.89 paid 02-22-01----- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #6 - Payment in the amount of $3,523.89 paid 03-29-01----ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant Halloran, Robertson & Associates as follows: Principal $35,238.87, Interest $9,537.47, Attorney's fees $660.00, Costs: Per memo of costs. For the total of $45,436.34.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits in open court and to prepare Judgment.

Feb. 19, 2004
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
